channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Intro to kubernetes
item.description: Intro to Kubernetes This guide is aimed for people who do not know what kubernetes is, but know what a container and what a virtual machine is. We will go through the why to kubernetes, and core...

item.title: AI MUSIC APP
item.description: Spotify, YouTube Music, and Audiomack inspired me to build my own music app. 🎵 Not as a business. Not for clout. Just because I could and because I wanted something that felt like me. If you know...

item.title: Starting Enterprise-wide Kafka Governance
item.description: Technical leadership isn't always about having the right title; it’s about having the right influence. When you are operating without direct authority, setting standards across autonomous teams...

item.title: The best thing about Copilot - what some executives get wrong about AI
item.description: Let me say this in advance: I love Copilot. Or, to be more precise, the Copilot Plugin for IntelliJ. It lets me choose suitable models, it's a seamless workflow with accepting the changes or...

item.title: The 44 best last-minute Mother’s Day gift ideas for 2026
item.description: Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. This Sunday, Mother's Day, is an opportunity to return the favor,...

item.title: AI vs Non-AI: Building the Same Project Twice
item.description: When I was implementing my weather station system, I asked myself: what if I built it again but this time using AI? The idea I had in mind was to compare the same project implemented with both...

item.title: Solving Substack TipTap CDP Publish (When Lexical Will Not Work)
item.description: TL;DR: After bashing my head against Reddit / IH / Twitter Lexical anti-bot for 2 hours, I tried the same approach on Substack and it just worked. TipTap is friendlier to programmatic input than...

item.title: AGENTS.md + Claude Skills + project hooks: making AI agents follow your architecture
item.description: Every TypeScript service I've started in the last three years opened with the same week: Wire up the ORM. Decide between Prisma, MikroORM, Drizzle. Write base classes for AggregateRoot,...

item.title: Egg Intake and the Incidence of Alzheimer's Disease in Adventist Health Study-2
item.description: Article URL: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0022316626001902 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48038873 Points: 4 # Comments: 1

item.title: SpaceX may spend up to $119 billion on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
item.description: SpaceX, Elon Musk's space company that also houses his AI company, xAI, is considering spending $55 billion, at least initially, to build a semiconductor factory in Texas, according to a filing...

item.title: Here’s what Microsoft is offering long-serving employees to voluntarily retire
item.description: Microsoft revealed last month that it's planning to offer long-serving employees in the US the ability to voluntarily retire. While the terms of the buyout were supposed to be announced to...

item.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
item.description: In just a few weeks of talks, DeepSeek's potential valuation has reportedly soared from $20 billion to $45 billion.

item.title: Your data is never actually being deleted
item.description: There's a reasonable assumption most people make when they press a delete button: that the thing gets deleted. It doesn't, and this isn't some secret — it's just how cloud infrastructure works,...

item.title: The Anatomy of an Action Governance Layer: From Intent to Enforcement
item.description: Picking Up Where We Left Off In Part 1, we established why post-execution safety fails and why pre-execution gates are an architectural necessity for AI systems that take real-world actions. Now...

item.title: I Am Begging AI Companies to Stop Naming Features After Human Processes
item.description: Anthropic announced “dreaming” for AI agents to sort through “memories” at its developer conference. Can we not?

item.title: Native Instruments Komplete 26 adds weird new synths and experimental piano sounds
item.description: The latest version of Native Instruments' Komplete music production bundle is here with 62 new additions, including the wonderfully weird Absynth 6. Komplete 26 comes in several flavors, starting...

item.title: The best beauty tech you can still grab in time for Mother’s Day
item.description: If you’re looking to indulge mom this Mother’s Day, a gift that makes her feel a little more taken care of is a good place to start. Fortunately, if you’re looking for something to make her feel...

item.title: This slim ice cream maker could fit in my already crowded kitchen
item.description: For the past few months, I've defiantly walked past the Ninja Creami at Costco as I think about our air fryer, toaster oven, breadmaker, rice cooker, and stand mixer already vying for limited...

item.title: 5 gardening tips you can try right in Search
item.description: An abstract background featuring soft, stippled illustrations of flowers and a butterfly in a bright palette of blue, green, and red. In the center of the image is a white circle containing a...

item.title: Google updates AI search to include quotes from Reddit and other sources
item.description: While citing web forums and discussion boards can help users find answers to more niche queries, this design choice could also prove chaotic.

item.title: Hackers Hate AI Slop Even More Than You Do
item.description: It's not just you. Scammers, hackers, and other cybercriminals are complaining about “AI shit” flooding platforms where they discuss cyberattacks and other illegal activity.

item.title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
item.description: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands...

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of...

item.title: Xbox changes continue with new console boot animation
item.description: It feels like not a day goes by at the moment without some Xbox news, and today is no different. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma just announced that Xbox owners will get a new boot up sound and animation on...

item.title: Here are the fitness trackers I actually recommend
item.description: Why do you want a fitness tracker? This is the first question I ask any time I’m asked to recommend a device. The number-one rule of wearable tech is that it has to be something you actually want...

item.title: Tinder owner Match Group is slowing hiring to pay for its increased use of AI tools
item.description: Match Group said that it's slowing its hiring plans for the rest of the year because AI tools "cost a lot of money."

item.title: Apple to pay $250M to settle lawsuit over Siri’s delayed AI features
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit for overpromising the arrival of Siri's AI features.

item.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
item.description: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week.

item.title: The Litter-Robot 4 bundle is back down to its best price of the year
item.description: Scooping cat litter isn’t hard, but scooping after each and every litter box use can get annoying. The Litter-Robot 4 self-cleaning litter box is worth considering, not just because it’s one of...

item.title: Blink bumps its budget buzzer to 2K
item.description: Amazon-owned Blink has two new video doorbells: the Blink Wired Doorbell 2K+ for $49.99 and the Blink Battery Doorbell 2K+ for $69.99 if you already have a sync module; or $79.99 bundled with the...
